# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.401 — Certification Generally

A person may perform an inspection, issue a vehicle inspection report, or submit inspection information to the department’s inspection database only if certified to do so by the department under rules adopted by the department.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 34, eff. March 1, 2015.*

subsections.text: A person may perform an inspection, issue a vehicle inspection report, or submit inspection information to the department’s inspection database only if certified to do so by the department under rules adopted by the department.
